question: How many orders are in the dataset?
validated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders LIMIT 10000

question: How many delivered orders are there?
validated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS delivered_order_count FROM orders WHERE delivered_status_flag=1 LIMIT 10000

question: What is total merchandise revenue?
validated_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(line_merchandise_value),2) AS merchandise_revenue FROM order_items LIMIT 10000

question: What is total gross order value including freight?
validated_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(line_total_value),2) AS gross_order_value FROM order_items LIMIT 10000

question: Show order counts by status.
validated_sql: SELECT order_status, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY order_status ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 10000

question: Show payment value by payment type.
validated_sql: SELECT payment_type, ROUND(SUM(payment_value),2) AS payment_value FROM payments GROUP BY payment_type ORDER BY payment_value DESC LIMIT 10000

question: What are the top 10 customer states by number of orders?
validated_sql: SELECT r.state_code, r.state_name_pt, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN regions r ON o.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY r.state_code,r.state_name_pt ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 10

question: What are the top 10 product categories by units sold?
validated_sql: SELECT c.category_name_en, COUNT(*) AS units_sold FROM order_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id=p.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id=c.category_id GROUP BY c.category_name_en ORDER BY units_sold DESC LIMIT 10

question: How many unique shoppers are there?
validated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_unique_id) AS unique_customer_count FROM orders LIMIT 10000

question: How many shoppers made repeat purchases?
validated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS repeat_customer_count FROM customer_features WHERE repeat_customer_flag=1 LIMIT 10000

question: Show monthly merchandise revenue.
validated_sql: SELECT year_month, merchandise_value FROM monthly_kpis ORDER BY year_month LIMIT 10000

question: Show monthly orders and unique customers.
validated_sql: SELECT year_month, order_count, unique_customer_count FROM monthly_kpis ORDER BY year_month LIMIT 10000

question: What are the top five categories by merchandise revenue?
validated_sql: SELECT c.category_name_en, ROUND(SUM(i.line_merchandise_value),2) AS merchandise_revenue FROM order_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id=p.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id=c.category_id GROUP BY c.category_name_en ORDER BY merchandise_revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which five sellers generated the most merchandise value?
validated_sql: SELECT s.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, ROUND(SUM(i.line_merchandise_value),2) AS merchandise_revenue FROM order_items i JOIN sellers s ON i.seller_id=s.seller_id GROUP BY s.seller_id,s.seller_city,s.seller_state ORDER BY merchandise_revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the late-delivery rate by customer state?
validated_sql: SELECT r.state_code, ROUND(AVG(o.delivered_late_flag),4) AS late_delivery_rate, COUNT(o.delivered_late_flag) AS evaluated_orders FROM orders o JOIN regions r ON o.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY r.state_code HAVING COUNT(o.delivered_late_flag)>0 ORDER BY late_delivery_rate DESC LIMIT 10000

question: What is the average review score by customer state?
validated_sql: SELECT r.state_code, ROUND(AVG(o.average_review_score),3) AS average_review_score, COUNT(o.average_review_score) AS reviewed_orders FROM orders o JOIN regions r ON o.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY r.state_code HAVING COUNT(o.average_review_score)>0 ORDER BY average_review_score DESC LIMIT 10000

question: Compare average review scores for on-time and late deliveries.
validated_sql: SELECT CASE delivered_late_flag WHEN 1 THEN 'late' WHEN 0 THEN 'on_time' ELSE 'unknown' END AS delivery_group, ROUND(AVG(average_review_score),3) AS average_review_score, COUNT(average_review_score) AS reviewed_orders FROM orders GROUP BY delivery_group ORDER BY delivery_group LIMIT 10000

question: Show average gross order value by month.
validated_sql: SELECT year_month, average_gross_order_value FROM monthly_kpis ORDER BY year_month LIMIT 10000

question: Which ten products sold the most units?
validated_sql: SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS units_sold, ROUND(SUM(line_merchandise_value),2) AS merchandise_revenue FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY units_sold DESC, merchandise_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

question: Show gross order value by Brazilian macroregion.
validated_sql: SELECT r.macroregion_name_en, ROUND(SUM(o.order_line_total_value),2) AS gross_order_value, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN regions r ON o.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY r.macroregion_name_en ORDER BY gross_order_value DESC LIMIT 10000

question: What percentage of delivered orders were late?
validated_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(delivered_late_flag)*100,2) AS late_delivery_percent, COUNT(delivered_late_flag) AS evaluated_orders FROM orders WHERE delivered_status_flag=1 LIMIT 10000

question: Which payment type has the highest average installments?
validated_sql: SELECT payment_type, ROUND(AVG(payment_installments),3) AS average_installments, COUNT(*) AS payment_rows FROM payments GROUP BY payment_type ORDER BY average_installments DESC LIMIT 10000

question: List orders without reviews.
validated_sql: SELECT order_id, order_status, order_purchase_timestamp FROM orders WHERE has_review_flag=0 ORDER BY order_purchase_timestamp LIMIT 10000

question: List orders without item rows.
validated_sql: SELECT order_id, order_status, order_purchase_timestamp FROM orders WHERE has_items_flag=0 ORDER BY order_purchase_timestamp LIMIT 10000

question: How many orders contain items from more than one seller?
validated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS multi_seller_order_count FROM orders WHERE distinct_seller_count>1 LIMIT 10000

question: Show the distribution of order basket sizes.
validated_sql: SELECT item_count, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY item_count ORDER BY item_count LIMIT 10000

question: Which categories have the highest freight ratio?
validated_sql: SELECT c.category_name_en, ROUND(SUM(i.freight_value)/NULLIF(SUM(i.line_total_value),0),4) AS freight_ratio, ROUND(SUM(i.line_total_value),2) AS gross_value FROM order_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id=p.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id=c.category_id GROUP BY c.category_name_en HAVING SUM(i.line_total_value)>0 ORDER BY freight_ratio DESC LIMIT 10

question: What is the negative review rate by product category?
validated_sql: WITH order_category AS (SELECT DISTINCT i.order_id,p.category_id FROM order_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id=p.product_id) SELECT c.category_name_en, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN o.average_review_score<=2 THEN 1.0 WHEN o.average_review_score IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE 0.0 END),4) AS negative_review_rate, COUNT(o.average_review_score) AS reviewed_orders FROM order_category oc JOIN orders o ON oc.order_id=o.order_id JOIN categories c ON oc.category_id=c.category_id GROUP BY c.category_name_en HAVING COUNT(o.average_review_score)>=20 ORDER BY negative_review_rate DESC LIMIT 10

question: Which customer states have the longest average delivery lead time?
validated_sql: SELECT r.state_code, ROUND(AVG(o.purchase_to_delivery_days),3) AS average_delivery_days, COUNT(o.purchase_to_delivery_days) AS delivered_orders FROM orders o JOIN regions r ON o.region_id=r.region_id WHERE o.chronology_anomaly_flag=0 GROUP BY r.state_code HAVING COUNT(o.purchase_to_delivery_days)>0 ORDER BY average_delivery_days DESC LIMIT 10

question: How many item shipments cross state borders between seller and customer?
validated_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN customer_state<>seller_state THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cross_state_items, COUNT(*) AS total_items, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN customer_state<>seller_state THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END),4) AS cross_state_rate FROM order_items_flat LIMIT 10000

question: Show quarterly merchandise revenue.
validated_sql: SELECT d.year_quarter, ROUND(SUM(o.merchandise_value),2) AS merchandise_revenue, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN dates d ON o.order_date_id=d.date_id GROUP BY d.year_quarter ORDER BY d.year_quarter LIMIT 10000

question: Who are the top ten shoppers by gross order value?
validated_sql: SELECT customer_unique_id, order_count, gross_order_value, average_gross_order_value FROM customer_features ORDER BY gross_order_value DESC LIMIT 10

question: What are the top ten customer cities by merchandise value?
validated_sql: SELECT c.customer_city, c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(o.merchandise_value),2) AS merchandise_revenue, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id=c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_city,c.customer_state ORDER BY merchandise_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

question: Which orders have the highest freight burden?
validated_sql: SELECT order_id, merchandise_value, freight_value, order_line_total_value, ROUND(freight_value/NULLIF(order_line_total_value,0),4) AS freight_ratio FROM orders WHERE order_line_total_value>0 ORDER BY freight_ratio DESC LIMIT 10

question: List payment reconciliation exceptions.
validated_sql: SELECT order_id, order_line_total_value, payment_value, payment_reconciliation_difference FROM orders WHERE payment_reconciled_flag=0 ORDER BY ABS(payment_reconciliation_difference) DESC LIMIT 10000

question: How many shoppers changed location across orders?
validated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS shoppers_with_location_change FROM customer_features WHERE location_changed_flag=1 LIMIT 10000

question: How much merchandise value comes from products without a source category?
validated_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(i.line_merchandise_value),2) AS uncategorized_merchandise_value, COUNT(*) AS uncategorized_items FROM order_items i JOIN products p ON i.product_id=p.product_id WHERE p.source_category_missing_flag=1 LIMIT 10000

question: Show all chronology anomalies for investigation.
validated_sql: SELECT order_id, order_purchase_timestamp, order_delivered_carrier_timestamp, order_delivered_customer_timestamp FROM orders WHERE chronology_anomaly_flag=1 ORDER BY order_purchase_timestamp LIMIT 10000

question: Which categories generated the most value in 2018?
validated_sql: SELECT c.category_name_en, ROUND(SUM(i.line_merchandise_value),2) AS merchandise_revenue FROM order_items i JOIN orders o ON i.order_id=o.order_id JOIN products p ON i.product_id=p.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id=c.category_id WHERE substr(o.order_purchase_timestamp,1,4)='2018' GROUP BY c.category_name_en ORDER BY merchandise_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

question: Give me the monthly series needed to forecast gross order value.
validated_sql: SELECT month_start, gross_order_value FROM monthly_kpis ORDER BY month_start LIMIT 10000
